title: tephrosia polystachya
intro: Tephrosia polystachya, also known as the bushveld pea or butterfly pea, is a perennial shrub native to southern Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. Tephrosia polystachya has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and is believed to have cardiovascular and immunomodulatory benefits. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in traditional herbal remedies, such as poultices and salves.
